channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] POLITICAL PRISONER → nan : Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action (Kremlin, Moskva, Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: POLITICAL PRISONER / nan. Location: Kremlin, Moskva, Russia. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAEL → TEHRAN : Fight with artillery and tanks (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with artillery and tanks. Actors: ISRAEL / TEHRAN. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] JEWISH → ISRAEL : Sexually assault (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Sexually assault. Actors: JEWISH / ISRAEL. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] nan → ISRAEL : Fight with artillery and tanks (Lebanon)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with artillery and tanks. Actors: nan / ISRAEL. Location: Lebanon. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 3 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAELI → LEBANON : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Beirut, Beyrouth, Lebanon)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAELI / LEBANON. Location: Beirut, Beyrouth, Lebanon. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Physically assault, not specified below. Actors: LEBANON / ISRAEL. Location: Lebanon. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 1 sources.
